project: Ink CLI Session UI V2 Web Parity
description: Share Slash Command catalog with Web, add Ink suggestions, and execute supported routed actions under the selected owner/session.

userStories.title: Build shared slash command catalog for CLI and Web
userStories.description: As a user, I want command names and descriptions to match between Web and CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Derive command descriptors from gateway capabilities and Web-added commands where applicable
Include CLI-only commands /help, /new, /room, /agent, /owner or /profile, /exit, /quit
Catalog marks browser-only or product-area commands with explicit unsupported reasons
Tests cover catalog generation and filtering
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in implementation commit ddbecd4. Extended src/session-ui/commandCatalog.ts so buildSlashCommandCatalog merges default Web parity commands, CLI navigation/recovery commands, Web-added browser commands, and gateway action infos with slashCommands arrays. CLI-owned /session, /room, /owner, /profile, /new, /agent, /help, /exit, /quit, and /repair-user-unknown keep terminal semantics when a gateway action uses the same slash. Added grouped help helpers, support labels, first-token prefix filtering, and explicit unsupported/deferred/browser-only reasons. Fake and local CliSessionSource now expose listSlashCommands(); the local source derives from the default plugin registry gateway action infos. Evidence: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs' passed 41/41 focused tests; docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run typecheck' passed. Full npm test ran 505 tests with 504 passed and only the pre-existing unrelated test/telemetry-store.test.mjs stale/prune assertion failed. Path classification: shared model/source/unit path plus real local source catalog from plugin registry; no Web DOM behavior changed.

userStories.title: Implement slash suggestions in Ink input
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want command suggestions while typing slash commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Typing / shows available commands with descriptions
Typing a prefix such as /th filters matching commands
Arrow keys move selection, Enter accepts or runs, Escape closes suggestions without corrupting input
pibo debug pty asserts suggestion list, filtering, selection, and escape behavior
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in implementation commit ddbecd4. Added Ink slash suggestion state and rendering: typing / shows catalog commands, typing a prefix such as /th filters to /thinking and /thinking-show, arrow keys move the selected suggestion, Enter accepts a prefix or runs an exact selected command, and Escape closes suggestions while preserving typed input. Evidence: focused tests in test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs cover reducer filtering, selection, escape preservation, and suggestion rendering; docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs' passed 41/41. PTY command: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-slash-suggestions && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-slash-suggestions --timeout-ms 60000 --idle-timeout-ms 15000 --cols 120 --rows 34 --wait-for "Select room for Web user alpha" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "/th" --wait-for "Slash commands" --expect "/thinking" --expect "/thinking-show" --press Down --expect "thinking-show" --press Escape --wait-for "Closed slash suggestions" --expect "› /th" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:alpha node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions --owner-scope user:alpha' passed. PTY classification: real PTY-backed CLI/TUI path with LocalCliSessionSource and deterministic mocked local router/source, not live provider. Raw artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-slash-suggestions/raw.ansi.log. Clean artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-slash-suggestions/clean.txt. Observed result: clean output shows Slash commands, /thinking, /thinking-show, selected thinking-show after Down, Closed slash suggestions, and preserved input › /th. Typecheck passed.

userStories.title: Execute basic routed slash actions
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want Web session actions such as status, compact, clear, abort, kill, and fast to run from terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI source executes routed actions for /status, /compact, /clear, /abort, /kill, /kill-all, and /fast under selected owner/session
Action results render through shared command result descriptors
Errors are redacted and bounded
Focused tests cover success, unsupported, and runtime-error cases
pibo debug pty runs /status and at least one runtime-affecting action against a real session when feasible
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Execute session metadata and clone actions
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want session inspection and clone commands to match Web behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Support /session-current and /sessions through routed actions or source equivalents
Support /clone and open/select derived session when returned
Results include session ids and links/labels suitable for terminal
pibo debug pty runs /session-current and /clone or records explicit reason clone cannot run in fixture
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace hard-coded help with catalog help
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want /help to show accurate commands, descriptions, and unsupported reasons.
acceptanceCriteria: /help renders commands from the shared catalog grouped by available, CLI navigation, and unsupported/deferred
Help includes owner/room/session keyboard controls
Tests cover help output and redaction/bounding
pibo debug pty runs /help and asserts catalog-derived entries
When marking passes true, notes include pibo debug pty command, scripted input/assertions, and raw/clean artifact paths
Focused tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed in implementation commit ddbecd4. Replaced hard-coded in-app command header and /help body with catalog-generated output grouped as Available Web/session actions, CLI navigation and recovery commands, and Unsupported or deferred terminal commands. Help includes owner/room/session keyboard controls and unsupported browser-only reasons such as /download and /upload. Multi-line help now renders as bounded individual terminal lines instead of truncating the whole catalog into one line. Evidence: focused tests in test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs cover grouped help, command header, pibo tui:sessions --help, and redaction/bounding; docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && npm run build >/tmp/pibo-build.log && node --test test/cli-ui-session-app.test.mjs test/session-ui-view-models.test.mjs test/cli-session-source.test.mjs' passed 41/41. PTY command: docker exec pibo-dev-ink-cli-v2-web-parity bash -lc 'cd /workspace && rm -rf .tmp/pty-slash-help .tmp/pty-slash-help-home && mkdir -p .tmp/pty-slash-help-home && npm run dev -- debug pty run --artifact --artifact-dir /workspace/.tmp/pty-slash-help --timeout-ms 60000 --idle-timeout-ms 15000 --cols 140 --rows 50 --wait-for "Select room for Web user alpha" --press Enter --wait-for "New session in Personal Chat" --press Enter --wait-for "Created session" --type "/help" --press Enter --wait-for "Slash command catalog" --expect "Available Web/session actions" --expect "CLI navigation and recovery commands" --expect "Unsupported or deferred terminal commands" --expect "/download" --expect "Keyboard controls" --press CtrlC -- env PIBO_HOME=/workspace/.tmp/pty-slash-help-home PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_MOCKED=1 PIBO_DEBUG_PTY_CLI_SESSIONS_OWNERS=user:alpha node dist/bin/pibo.js tui:sessions --owner-scope user:alpha' passed. PTY classification: real PTY-backed CLI/TUI path with LocalCliSessionSource, temp PIBO_HOME, and deterministic mocked local router/source, not live provider. Raw artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-slash-help/raw.ansi.log. Clean artifact: /root/code/pibo/.worktrees/ink-cli-v2-web-parity/.tmp/pty-slash-help/clean.txt. Observed result: clean output shows Slash command catalog, all three help groups, /download unsupported entry, and Keyboard controls. Typecheck passed.
